     The Numbers Business Report

Legend (2015)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $1,872,994Details
International Box Office $40,407,450
Worldwide Box Office $42,280,444
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,001,807
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,204,937
Total $2,206,744
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Together, the Kray Twins take over the city. But as their reign expands, power-struggles, fierce madness, and a woman diminishes their bond; the weak link that could cause their empire to collapse. It takes us into the secret history of the 1960s and the extraordinary events that secured the infamy of the Kray twins. “The Old East End and the Swinging Sixties are long gone, and so are its doppelgängers, the Krays; all of it slipped into the alchemy of legend. Lies abound, the facts are elusive, but some truth can still be found… “

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$86,836 (4.6% of total gross)
Legs:5.75 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:4.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$25,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:4 opening theaters/107 max. theaters, 3.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $2,656,543

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 20th, 2015 (Limited) by Universal
International Releases: September 11th, 2015 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
October 1st, 2015 (Wide) (Russia (CIS))
October 1st, 2015 (Wide) (Ukraine)
October 2nd, 2015 (Wide) (Turkey)
October 8th, 2015 (Wide) (Croatia)
Video Release: February 16th, 2016 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for strong violence, language throughout, some sexual and drug material.
(Rating bulletin 2377, 6/10/2015)
Running Time: 131 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Same Actor, Multiple Roles, Voiceover/Narration
Geographical setting: London, United Kingdom
Plot point: Suicide, Twins
Social setting: Organized Crime
Subgenre: Crime Thriller
Time period setting: 1960s
Source:Based on Real Life Events
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Dramatization
Production/Financing Companies: Cross Creek Pictures, StudioCanal, Working Title Films, Anton Capital Entertainment, Universal Pictures
Production Countries: United Kingdom
Languages: English

Synopsis

Together, the Kray Twins take over the city. But as their reign expands, power-struggles, fierce madness, and a woman diminishes their bond; the weak link that could cause their empire to collapse. It takes us into the secret history of the 1960s and the extraordinary events that secured the infamy of the Kray twins. “The Old East End and the Swinging Sixties are long gone, and so are its doppelgängers, the Krays; all of it slipped into the alchemy of legend. Lies abound, the facts are elusive, but some truth can still be found… “
